name: Cogna8 Action Authority
description: Gate OpenClaw tool calls through Cogna8's action authority runtime

apiKey.description: Cogna8 API key. Generate one at https://openclaw.cogna8.ai/dashboard/keys

agentId.description: Agent identifier sent to Cogna8. Use default if you do not manage per-agent rules yet.

failureMode.description: Open allows tool calls on service failure. Closed blocks tool calls on service failure.

apiKey.label: Cogna8 API key
apiKey.help: Generate a key in the OpenClaw Portal

failureMode.label: Failure mode
failureMode.help: Choose whether tool calls are allowed or blocked when Cogna8 is unavailable
